title: Internal (Asymptotic) Stability
summary: The page concludes the BIBO stability discussion for discrete-time LTI systems by stating that absolute summability of the impulse response is a sufficient and necessary condition for stability. It then begins subsection 3.9-2 on internal (asymptotic) stability, relating zero-input response modes γⁿ to the magnitude of characteristic roots and introducing the unit-circle criterion.
